title: onobrychis poikilantha
intro: Onobrychis poikilantha, also known as the desert clover, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Central Asia and China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis poikilantha include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in folk medicine as a treatment for various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
